hero.place: Zhubuyuan, No. 160, Hanzhong St., Wanhua Dist., Taipei
info.title: Aoi Hinamori First Solo Exhibition: Eclipse / Light
info.copy:
Eclipse / Light means that the light may have been swallowed, but it never truly disappeared.

This is not only an art exhibition.
It is also the story of the path I have walked.

Maybe you will see the me who once shone brightly,
the me who was swallowed by darkness,
and finally the me who learned how to make peace with myself again.

Thank you to everyone who has stayed with me along the way.
Because of you,
I was able to reach this point step by step.

This time,
I want to personally guide you into the world of Eclipse / Light.
profile.bio: A vampire nurse born in the Demon Realm and an independent Taiwanese Vtuber. Aoi officially debuted on February 6, 2021. She mainly streams on YouTube and occasionally on Twitch, with streams focused on chatting, games, ASMR, and special projects.
transport.title: Transportation
transport.source: (The following information was summarized by Google Gemini.)
transport.metro: Take the Bannan Line (Blue Line) or Songshan-Xindian Line (Green Line) to Ximen Station. Leave from Exit 1, turn left, and walk south along Hanzhong Street. You will pass the Red House, and the venue is about a 3 to 5 minute walk away.
transport.scooter: If you are short on time, GoShare or iRent can be convenient options. There are many scooter parking spaces around Ximending. If taking Uber or a taxi, set your drop-off near the intersection of Hanzhong Street and Neijiang Street. From the Zhongzheng District area, the ride usually takes about 10 to 15 minutes.
transport.bus: You can take routes such as 12, 202, 212, 218, 223, or 260 and get off at MRT Ximen Station or Ximen Market (Chengdu). From there, walk toward Hanzhong Street for about 5 minutes.
transport.drive: Traffic around Ximending can be heavy on holidays or during peak hours, and the alleys are narrow with limited street parking. Consider parking at Emei Parking Tower, Taiwan Parking (Da Shi Jie), or Zhongshan Hall Underground Parking, then walking about 5 to 10 minutes to the venue.
goods.title: Exhibition Limited Goods
goods.ctaKicker: Not sure how much you will spend?
goods.ctaText: Estimate the total cost of the goods you want
goods.modal.comicsDescription: A diary comic created over 3 years, carrying Aoi's everyday stories. Illustrated by Ibi. Specifications Size: A5 52 full-color interior pages * Includes one A3 poster with purchase of the comic.
goods.modal.laheeDescription:
This necklace centers its design on a cross and a sunflower🌻
It turns unforgettable melodies, scenery, and feelings from the journey into a light you can keep close to your heart✨

Specifications:
Cross size: approx. 50 × 40mm
Zircon set in the center
Chain length: 16 / 18 inches available
Material: copper, K-gold plating
Includes storage pouch and jewelry box
goods.modal.bag: Pre-order Item - Handmade Leather Travel Bag
goods.modal.bagDescription:
Limited to 5 pieces
A fully handmade leather travel bag.

Specifications
Materials: waxed canvas + crazy horse leather (cowhide) + brass hardware
Size: 44 x 28 x 22 cm

Fits a full-face helmet
Also fits clothes for a 2-day, 1-night trip
goods.modal.cards: Pre-order Item - Random Card Pack Overview
goods.modal.cardsDescription:
Each pack includes 4 cards, with 1 card of R rarity or higher.
Rarities: N Normal | R Foil | SR Gold Diamond | UR Frame Break
Reference rates: N 75% | R 15% | SR 9% | UR 1%
* UR only refers to the two lower-left hidden replica-signature cards.
faq.title: Q&A
faq.intro: Questions about admission, queueing, goods purchases, pre-order items, photography rules, and other visitor topics have been organized here. Search by category or keyword to find answers quickly.
footer.disclaimer: Information on this website may not be updated immediately. Please refer to Aoi Hinamori's stream descriptions and official announcements for the latest details.
